about.createAccount: Use the Sign-In button above and look for the "Sign Up" link on the proceeding page to create an account.
about.acknowledgementsIntro: This software uses code from the following open source projects:
about.sinclairRomText: Amstrad have kindly given their permission for the redistribution of their copyrighted material but retain that copyright.
about.intro1: A ZX Spectrum emulator & programming environment for the browser. Source available <srcLink>here</srcLink>.
about.intro2: An alternative website, related to this one, is available at <zxplayLink>zxplay.org</zxplayLink>. ZX Play is a mobile-friendly ZX Spectrum emulator, for games.
about.legal: Please read <privacyLink>privacy policy</privacyLink> and <termsLink>terms of use</termsLink>, for this website.
